rolesQuestion: How do you want to get involved? *
successBody: We received your sign-up. A volunteer will follow up by email when we can match you locally.
consentText: I agree that Protect Ontario volunteers may contact me about this sign-up. My details are used only for organizing—not sold to third parties. *

roles.label: I want a sign
roles.description: Request a Ford Failed You yard sign—we’ll follow up about size and local delivery.

roles.label: Host a drop-off / pickup point
roles.description: Store signs briefly so neighbours can pick up or receive deliveries.

roles.label: Volunteer
roles.description: Help with delivery, events, outreach, or other organizer tasks.

roles.label: Something else
roles.description: None of the above? Tell us what you have in mind—we’ll figure it out.

yardSign.introPrefix: $10 per sign, delivered by volunteers—not shipped by mail. Pay on
yardSign.deliveryAddressPlaceholder: Street address, intersection, or clear directions for drop-off
yardSign.paymentPaidLabel: I already paid $10 per sign (Products, Stripe, or e-transfer)
yardSign.paymentNotYetLabel: Not yet — I will pay on Products, Stripe, or e-transfer
yardSign.deliveryNotesPlaceholder: Porch vs apartment, best times, etc.

dropoff.locationLabel: Address or area you can serve *
dropoff.locationPlaceholder: Neighbourhood, intersection, or full address if you are comfortable sharing
dropoff.availabilityPlaceholder: e.g. Weekday evenings, Saturday mornings, flexible
dropoff.capacityLabel: Roughly how many signs can you store at once?
dropoff.listPubliclyLabel: May we list your area publicly for neighbours? *

volunteer.availabilityPlaceholder: Hours per week, days, or specific dates
volunteer.vehicleLabel: Do you have a vehicle for local runs?

other.intro: Weird idea? Partnership? Something we didn't list? Put it here—we read everything.
other.detailsPlaceholder: Describe your request in a few sentences…

successYardSign.prefix: Haven't paid yet? Pay $10 per sign on

validation.chooseRole: Please choose how you want to get involved.
validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.consent: Please confirm you agree to be contacted.
validation.phoneSign: Please enter a phone number so we can arrange delivery.
validation.city: Please enter your city or community.
validation.deliveryAddress: Please tell us where you live / where we should deliver the sign(s).
validation.signQuantity: Please tell us how many signs you need.
validation.signPayment: Please tell us if you have paid yet ($10 per sign).
validation.otherDetails: Please describe what you’re looking for.
validation.dropoffLocation: Please describe where you can host pickup or drop-off.
validation.dropoffAvailability: Please share when you are usually available.
validation.dropoffListPublicly: Please say whether we may list your area publicly.
validation.volunteerRoles: Please select at least one way you can help.

errors.unavailable: Sign-up is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or use the About contact form.
errors.loading: Still loading—please try again in a moment.
errors.submitFailed: Something went wrong sending your sign-up. Please try again in a moment, or email the organizers listed on About.
